definition: value as specified by level (minmax) of the direct voltage on grid 2 with respect to grid 1 for visual extinction of the focused spot of a colour display tube at maximum cathode voltage

definition_ml.en: value as specified by level (minmax) of the direct voltage on grid 2 with respect to grid 1 for visual extinction of the focused spot of a colour display tube at maximum cathode voltage

remark: Adjustment procedure: |With all cathodes at maximum voltage, V_g2} is increased to a value at which one of the colours becomes just visible. Then the cathode voltages of the remaining guns are decreased until the other colours also become visible.

remark_ml.en: Adjustment procedure: |With all cathodes at maximum voltage, V_g2} is increased to a value at which one of the colours becomes just visible. Then the cathode voltages of the remaining guns are decreased until the other colours also become visible.
